summary: Selected recent papers emphasize gamma+jet strategies for medium-induced jet broadening, isobar geometry-to-flow response, magnetic-field QCD symmetry restoration, experimental bulk-production synthesis, and physics-ML methods for interpretable inference and conservation-law-preserving reduced-order modeling.
strongest_paper: 2607.12041: gamma+jet medium-induced jet broadening study with direct observable-level relevance for heavy-ion jet measurements.

papers.title: Using gamma+jets to quantify medium-induced jet broadening in heavy-ion collisions
papers.authors: Ankita Budhraja, Marco van Leeuwen, Wouter Waalewijn
papers.abstract: The paper uses JEWEL gamma+jet simulations to reduce inclusive-jet selection bias and test whether trimmed small-radius subjet reconstructions can recover large-radius medium-induced broadening signals in heavy-ion collisions.

papers.title: Harmonic-dependent geometry-to-flow transfer in AMPT Ru+Ru and Zr+Zr isobar collisions
papers.abstract: The paper introduces an eccentricity-normalized isobar response double ratio in AMPT simulations and reports near-unity elliptic response but residual triangular-flow response after eccentricity normalization.

papers.title: Chiral and U(1)_A symmetries in background magnetic fields from lattice QCD
papers.authors: Heng-Tong Ding, Jose Javier Hernandez Hernandez, Dan Zhang
papers.abstract: The paper studies neutral-sector chiral and singlet U(1)_A partner susceptibility splittings in lattice QCD under background magnetic fields and finds low-temperature enhancement and near-crossover suppression trends.

papers.title: Experimental Review on Bulk Properties and Light/Strange Hadron Production in Heavy-Ion Collisions
papers.abstract: This SQM2026 proceedings article reviews recent experimental results on bulk properties, light and strange hadron production, flow, nuclear modification factors, and high-baryon-density collectivity.

papers.title: Physically Consistent Parameter Inference: Transparent Machine Learning Emulation in High Energy Physics and Cosmology
papers.authors: Jorge Alda, Jacobo Asorey, Alejandro Mir, Siannah Penaranda
papers.abstract: The paper uses XGBoost to emulate complex non-Gaussian likelihood landscapes for HEP and cosmology global fits, with SHAP values for interpretability and validation on B-decay flavor-anomaly inference.

papers.title: Structure-preserving variational neural fields: Uncertainty-quantified reduced-order modeling of nonlinear conservation laws
papers.abstract: The paper develops uncertainty-aware latent neural fields that preserve conservation laws through a divergence-free solution-flux representation and tests them on advection, Euler, and shallow-water equations.

papers.title: Thermo-electric transport in non-extensive QCD matter in presence of magnetic field
papers.authors: Lateef Ahmad Wani, Salman Ahamad Khan
papers.abstract: The paper studies Seebeck and Nernst coefficients in a magnetized non-extensive QGP using RTA kinetic theory and a quasiparticle model.
